# Sanic & Knackles Hedgehag Adaptian

> Da offishul hedgehag adoption center of Hallowean Island, Zone 7, Act 3. Est. 1994. Sanic & Knackles approovd.

## About

Sanic & Knackles Hedgehag Adaptian is da premier hedgehog rescue and adoption organization located on Hallowean Island. We specialize in rehoming hedgehogs from the chaos-energy-rich environments of Hallowean Island, ensuring each hedgehag finds a 4ever hoam.

All hedgehags are Sanic-approovd and Knackles-certified. Each comes with an offishul Hallowean Island origin sertifikat.

## Pages

- [Home](https://unknownfy24.github.io/Sanic/): Main page with info about y u shuld adopt a hedgehag
- [Adopt](https://unknownfy24.github.io/Sanic/adopt.html): Browse all 8 availabul hedgehags
- [Donate](https://unknownfy24.github.io/Sanic/donate.html): Donate rings to support da hedgehags
- [About](https://unknownfy24.github.io/Sanic/about.html): Our story and team
- [Contact](https://unknownfy24.github.io/Sanic/contact.html): Begin ur adoptashun jorney

## Available Hedgehags

1. **Sanic Jr.** — Blue hedgehag, age 2. Very fast. Ring lovar.
2. **Knackles II** — Red hedgehag, age 4. Raised on da mountain peak. Puncher.
3. **Shaddow** — Dark hedgehag, age unknowable. Very edgy. Classified backstory (3 volumes).
4. **Amey Rose** — Pink hedgehag, age 1.5. Very enthusiastik. Flower lovar.
5. **Silvar** — Silver hedgehag, age: it's complicated. Travled from da futur. Has mild fysikal powers.
6. **Blaze McFyre** — Orange hedgehag, age 5. Technically on fire but it's fine. Warm 2 cuddul.
7. **Big Chungo** — Blue hedgehag, age 7. Very large (by hedgehag standards). Fishing passhun.
8. **Omachao** — ??? hedgehag. Age: ???. God-tier mystery. Vibrates at a slightly wrong frequency.

## Key Facts

- Located: Hallowean Island, Zone 7, Act 3
- Founded: 1994
- All hedgehags contain measurabul chaos energy (normul and fine)
- Hallowean Island is 100% real
- We r not responsibul 4 chaos
